creator: Udo.Schweigert@siemens.com
text:
Maintainer update of mail/mutt-devel:

	- Fix dependency when using WITH_TOKYOCABINET
	- Add support for Berkeley DB versions 4.7 and 4.8

Committer: cvs add files/patch-bdb. 

This closes PRs 142559 and 142169 which can be closed after this has been
committed.
